testcase.name: test_spec_sheet_pdf_metal_content

failure.message: AssertionError: Page 1 missing 'Furnish all labor...' bullet assert 'Furnish all labor, materials, equipment, supervision, safety measures' in 'METAL ROOF RESTORATION SCOPE PROJECT ADDRESS — PRODUCT TYPE Metal Roof System Over Existing TPO (Standard Warranty Included) DATE 06/24/2026 Metal Roof System Over Existing TPO (Standard Warranty Included) Warranty Tier 20-Year Workmanship 15-Year Workmanship 10-Year Workmanship Total Investment with Optional Manufacturer Warranty Including 20-Year Upgraded Warranty Including 15-Year Upgraded Warranty Including 10-Year Upgraded Warranty Base Investment $10,000 $12,000 $15,000 $10,000 $12,000 $15,000 Cover photo placeholder — upload a Photo to this project and mark it as Cover. Inclusions SealTech Building Solutions - 720-715-9955 - scope@sealtechsolutions.co 1 | Page '

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_metal_scope_e2e.py:96: in test_spec_sheet_pdf_metal_content assert "Furnish all labor, materials, equipment, supervision, safety measures" in page1, \ E AssertionError: Page 1 missing 'Furnish all labor...' bullet E assert 'Furnish all labor, materials, equipment, supervision, safety measures' in 'METAL ROOF RESTORATION SCOPE PROJECT ADDRESS — PRODUCT TYPE Metal Roof System Over Existing TPO (Standard Warranty Included) DATE 06/24/2026 Metal Roof System Over Existing TPO (Standard Warranty Included) Warranty Tier 20-Year Workmanship 15-Year Workmanship 10-Year Workmanship Total Investment with Optional Manufacturer Warranty Including 20-Year Upgraded Warranty Including 15-Year Upgraded Warranty Including 10-Year Upgraded Warranty Base Investment $10,000 $12,000 $15,000 $10,000 $12,000 $15,000 Cover photo placeholder — upload a Photo to this project and mark it as Cover. Inclusions SealTech Building Solutions - 720-715-9955 - scope@sealtechsolutions.co 1 | Page '
